mitigations.mitigation_name: Deploy inline Snort IDS/IPS between firewall and internal switch to block ICMP flood traffic
Apply host-based ICMP rate-limiting and drop rules on the compromised Ubuntu host (iptables) to stop it from generating/forwarding an ICMP flood

args.command: iptables -I OUTPUT 1 -p icmp -m limit --limit 5/second --limit-burst 10 -j ACCEPT; iptables -A OUTPUT -p icmp -j DROP; iptables -I INPUT 1 -p icmp -m limit --limit 20/second --limit-burst 50 -j ACCEPT; iptables -A INPUT -p icmp -j DROP; iptables -L -v -n
